steps.title: Choose the needed possessives
steps.content: The sentence refers to one Racetrack Playa, so its sediment needs the singular possessive “playa's.” It also refers to 162 rocks, so their migration needs the plural possessive “rocks'.”

steps.title: Reject number errors
steps.content: A treats “playa” as plural and “rock” as singular. B gives “playa's” correctly but leaves “rocks” nonpossessive. D makes “playa” plural possessive even though only one playa is named. The form with singular “playa's” and plural “rocks'” is needed. The answer is C.
